content.json:
# 🛡️ SpyCloud Sentinel — Threat Intelligence Dashboard

Real-time darknet exposure visibility, credential compromise analysis, and automated remediation tracking.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Metric:string, Value:long)["Total Exposures", 0, "Unique Users", 0, "Unique Devices", 0, "Sev 25 Critical", 0, "Sev 20 High", 0, "Plaintext Passwords", 0]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize TotalExposures=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), UniqueDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id), Sev25=countif(severity==25), Sev20=countif(severity==20), Plaintext=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext))
| project pack_array(
    pack("Metric", "Total Exposures", "Value", TotalExposures),
    pack("Metric", "Unique Users", "Value", UniqueUsers),
    pack("Metric", "Unique Devices", "Value", UniqueDevices),
    pack("Metric", "Sev 25 Critical", "Value", Sev25),
    pack("Metric", "Sev 20 High", "Value", Sev20),
    pack("Metric", "Plaintext PWs", "Value", Plaintext))
| mv-expand Column1
| evaluate bag_unpack(Column1))
content.title: Exposure Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, severity:string, Count:long)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), tostring(severity)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Exposures Over Time by Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Severity:string, Count:long)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by Severity=case(severity==25, "P1 Critical (25)", severity==20, "P1 High (20)", severity==5, "P3 Standard (5)", severity==2, "P4 Low (2)", "Other"))
content.title: Severity Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(email:string, Exposures:long, MaxSev:long, PlaintextPWs:long, Domains:long, Latest:datetime)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSev=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), Domains=dcount(target_domain), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| top 25 by MaxSev desc, Exposures desc)
content.title: Top 25 Most Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(password_type:string, Count:long)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(password_type)
| summarize Count=count() by password_type
| top 10 by Count desc)
content.title: Password Type Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(target_domain:string, Count:long)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(target_domain)
| summarize Count=count() by target_domain
| top 15 by Count desc)
content.title: Top Targeted Domains

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(infected_machine_id:string, user_hostname:string, Users:long, MaxSev:long, Domains:long, Latest:datetime)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize Users=dcount(email), MaxSev=max(severity), Domains=dcount(target_domain), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by infected_machine_id, user_hostname
| top 25 by MaxSev desc, Users desc)
content.title: Top 25 Infected Devices

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(country_code:string, Devices:long, Users:long)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(country_code)
| summarize Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id), Users=dcount(email) by country_code
| top 20 by Devices desc)
content.title: Infections by Country

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Metric:string, Value:long)["MDE Actions", 0, "CA Actions", 0, "High-Sev Users", 0]),
(union
  (Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value=count() | extend Metric="MDE Actions"),
  (SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value=count() | extend Metric="CA Actions"),
  (SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 | summarize Value=dcount(email) | extend Metric="High-Sev Users")
| project Metric, Value)
content.title: Remediation Dashboard

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Actions:long, PlaybookName:string)[]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), PlaybookName)
content.title: MDE Remediation Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Actions:long, PlaybookName:string)[]),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), PlaybookName)
content.title: CA Remediation Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(source_id:long, breach_title:string, status:string, description:string, TimeGenerated:datetime)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| top 25 by TimeGenerated desc
| project source_id, breach_title, status, description, TimeGenerated)
content.title: Recent Breach Catalog Entries

content.json:
---
*SpyCloud Sentinel Supreme — Dashboard refreshes with time range selector.*
